description: Add 26 new feature flags (25 from analysis + eta_display_mode) to the seed file and update the admin UI component to display all flags with proper metadata, descriptions, and toggle controls.
steps: 1. Update apps/web/prisma/seed.ts to add 26 new feature flag upserts after the existing 4 flags. The new flags are: delivery_mode (enabled:true, config:{mode:'both'}), instant_delivery_enabled (enabled:true), minimum_order_value (enabled:true, config:{value:149}), free_delivery_threshold (enabled:true, config:{value:499}), delivery_radius_km (enabled:true, config:{value:5}), max_orders_per_hour (enabled:false, config:{value:50, action:'queue'}), surge_pricing_enabled (enabled:false, config:{multiplier:1.5, message:'High demand'}), tip_enabled (enabled:true), wallet_topup_enabled (enabled:false), reviews_enabled (enabled:true), referral_enabled (enabled:false, config:{senderReward:50, receiverReward:50}), multi_language_enabled (enabled:true), express_checkout_enabled (enabled:true), store_open_hours (enabled:false, config:{open:'07:00', close:'22:00', autoToggle:true}), maintenance_mode (enabled:false, config:{message:'Back in 30 minutes', eta:null}), cod_enabled (enabled:true), upi_on_delivery_enabled (enabled:true), new_user_discount (enabled:false, config:{percent:20, maxDiscount:100, minOrder:199}), delivery_partner_assignment (enabled:true, config:{mode:'nearest'}), order_edit_window_minutes (enabled:true, config:{value:5}), substitute_approval_mode (enabled:true, config:{mode:'always_ask'}), dark_store_mode (enabled:false), slot_only_mode (enabled:false), max_items_per_order (enabled:true, config:{value:50}), live_tracking_enabled (enabled:true), eta_display_mode (enabled:true, config:{mode:'after_assignment'}).

2. Update apps/web/components/admin/feature-flag-settings.tsx: Expand the FLAG_META record to include all 30 flags (4 existing + 26 new) with appropriate labels, descriptions, and lucide icons. The component should render simple toggle cards (using the existing FlagCard pattern) for boolean-only flags, and expandable config sections for flags with config objects. Group flags visually into categories: Delivery, Payments, Customer Experience, Operations, System.
3. The admin settings page (apps/web/app/admin/settings/page.tsx) already passes all flags dynamically from the DB, so no changes needed there -- it will automatically show new flags once seeded.
acceptance_criteria: prisma/seed.ts contains upserts for all 30 feature flags (4 original + 26 new) with correct keys, defaults, and configs
The FeatureFlagSettings component has metadata entries for all 30 flags and renders them in categorized sections
TypeScript compiles without errors (npx tsc --noEmit in apps/web)
verification: Run: cd apps/web && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty to confirm no type errors
Run: cd apps/web && npx next lint to confirm no lint errors
